items.speaker: Inara
items.text: Thanks for waiting, {PlayerName}. I feel much better now.

items.speaker: Inara
items.text: Human memory can be so unreliable at times.

items.speaker: Inara
items.text: Even if you try to hold onto a memory, repeating it over and over... you can still lose it one day, without even knowing.

options.text: At least you remember it now.
The dreams held that memory for you.

items.speaker: Inara
items.text: Let's... take a picture here. I want to remember this place. I won't forget. Not again.
